basics.name: Nik Korablin
basics.label: Full-stack JavaScript Engineer
basics.summary: Experienced Engineering Manager and full-stack JavaScript engineer with a proven track record of leading high-performing teams and delivering scalable, data-driven solutions. Skilled in React, Node.js, TypeScript, and cloud-native architectures. Adept at optimizing search technologies, building robust A/B testing frameworks, and driving product innovation. I value writing clean, testable code and mentoring engineers to achieve their full potential.

work.name: HubSpot
highlights: Lead a team of 5 engineers building a centralized permissions platform used across multiple product surfaces
Define frontend architecture and technical strategy for a complex, rules-driven system governing user access and feature entitlements
Partner with product, design, and backend teams to create intuitive UI abstractions over complex permission logic, improving usability and reducing implementation friction across teams

Led development of an AI-driven permissions platform that allows administrators to define and manage access control through natural language, reducing complexity and improving usability of a traditionally technical system

work.name: The Knot
highlights: Led a team of 6 engineers building a large-scale React eCommerce platform serving millions of users
Designed and implemented an internal A/B testing platform, doubling experiment throughput and enabling product and marketing teams to independently launch and analyze experiments
Led migration from Algolia to ElasticSearch, reducing infrastructure cost and increasing flexibility in search customization
Architected a variant-based data model that unlocked new product capabilities and simplified downstream integrations
Collaborated closely with product, design, and business stakeholders to align technical solutions with growth and user experience goals

work.name: iFIT
highlights: Led development of React-based applications for embedded fitness devices, delivering performant and intuitive user experiences
Designed and built serverless microservices (Node.js, AWS Lambda) supporting real-time data processing and device communication
Established best practices for testing and maintainability across frontend and backend systems

work.name: Stealth-mode fintech startup
highlights: Built a real-time financial research platform from the ground up using React, Node.js, and Electron
Implemented live data streaming features for stock ticker updates and user interactions
Developed interactive chat functionality to support collaborative analysis workflows

highlights.text: Landlord review platform that facilitated feedback for renters, enabling better rental decision-making
Built the entire application from scratch
Built the platform with Ruby on Rails and React
Worked on a retail advice platform
Wrote unit tests and end-to-end tests using Cucumber
Developed websites for small and large businesses
